announcements.title: Fall 2026 EECS enrollment
announcements.body: EECS 16A and COMPSCI 61A fill quickly — add backup sections and watch Phase I/II appointment times on CalCentral.

announcements.title: Engineering Guide update
announcements.body: Check the 2024-25 undergraduate guide for the latest ECE sample program and design course list.

questions.title: 16A vs 16B workload?
questions.body: How much time should I budget for labs and homework in the 16 series?

answers.body: Plan 12–15 hours/week combined once projects start. Go to office hours early for the design labs.

questions.title: Best path to upper-div ECE breadth?
questions.body: Should I take ELENG 120 before 105 or does order matter?

contributor_spotlight.bio: Early preview contributor building the Berkeley EECS interactive roadmap from the 2024-25 Engineering Guide.
